name.description: Semantic package view name, for example Host Readiness.

packageId.description: Package contract id that owns this atom view.

operationId.description: Public auditable operation id connected to the view graph.

directory.description: Directory where atom view modules should be written.

export.description: Update an index.ts barrel in the atom view directory.

reactivityKey.description: Reactivity key refreshed by the operation.

baseAtomId.description: Stable id for the generated base atom shell.

derivedAtomId.description: Stable id for the generated derived atom shell.

packageViewAtomId.description: Stable id for the generated package view atom shell.

project.description: Owning Nx project recorded in Source BOM provenance.

generatorVersion.description: Generator package version recorded in Source BOM provenance.

generatorRevision.description: Generator source revision recorded in Source BOM provenance.

openspecChangeId.description: OpenSpec change id recorded in Source BOM provenance.
